results.actual: Sign up calls supabase.auth.signUp(), session triggers onAuthStateChange, dashboard renders with expense list.
results.expected: User created, dashboard loads

results.actual: signInWithPassword() succeeds, onAuthStateChange sets user, dashboard renders with existing expenses fetched.
results.expected: Dashboard loads with existing expenses visible

results.actual: supabase.auth.signOut() called, onAuthStateChange sets user to null, App renders AuthForm.
results.expected: Auth screen shown, dashboard unmounts

results.actual: getSession() restores session from Supabase token store on mount, dashboard renders without re-auth.
results.expected: Session persists across tab close/reopen

results.actual: Supabase returns user_already_exists error, caught and displayed in red alert. Form stays interactive.
results.expected: Error message shown, not a crash

results.actual: Client-side check: if (!email.trim()) sets error 'Email is required.' Shown in red alert. Submission prevented.
results.expected: Email is required. shown

results.actual: Client-side check: if (!password) sets error 'Password is required.' Shown in red alert.
results.expected: Password is required. shown

results.actual: Client-side check: password.length < 6 sets error 'Password must be at least 6 characters.' API never called.
results.expected: Password must be at least 6 characters. shown

results.actual: Supabase returns Invalid login credentials, caught and displayed in red alert. No crash.
results.expected: Supabase error message shown, not a crash

results.actual: noValidate on form allows submission; Supabase returns invalid email format error, displayed in alert.
results.expected: Some error shown about invalid email format
results.notes: No client-side email format regex — error comes from Supabase. Acceptable behavior.

results.actual: Form inserts to Supabase with user_id, row appears in list with correct amount, category icon, date, note.
results.expected: Entry appears with $47.50, food icon, date, note

results.actual: note.trim() || null sends null to DB. ExpenseList renders {expense.note && ...} so null note shows nothing.
results.expected: Entry appears without note showing null

results.actual: Edit form pre-fills with expense values, onUpdate calls supabase update, state refreshes with new values.
results.expected: Row updates to show $52.75 and new note

results.actual: supabase.delete called, row filtered from local state immediately.
results.expected: Row removed, totals update

results.actual: Expenses grouped by date.slice(0,7) key; June 2026 and May 2026 render as separate sections with correct subtotals.
results.expected: Two month groups with correct subtotals

results.actual: React renders text content via JSX text node, not innerHTML. Apostrophe stored and displayed as literal character.
results.expected: Apostrophe displays correctly

results.actual: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML used. React auto-escapes content. Script tag renders as literal text.
results.expected: Script tag renders as text, no alert fires

results.actual: input min=0.01 allows it; parseFloat(0.01) > 0 passes validation; DB numeric(10,2) stores it; toFixed(2) displays $0.01.
results.expected: Saves and displays as $0.01

results.actual: 99999.99 well within numeric(10,2) range. No JS number overflow. Displays correctly.
results.expected: Saves and displays correctly

results.actual: Button disabled={loading} prevents second submission. First click sets loading=true, second click is a no-op.
results.expected: Only one entry created

results.actual: date.slice(0,7) = '2026-04' keys to April group. Months sorted descending, so April 2026 renders as a separate section.
results.expected: Appears under April 2026 heading

results.actual: if (!amount.trim()) sets error 'Amount is required.' Form not submitted.
results.expected: Amount is required. shown

results.actual: parseFloat(0) <= 0 fails check, error 'Amount must be a positive number.' shown.
results.expected: Amount must be a positive number. shown

results.actual: parseFloat(-15) <= 0 fails check, error 'Amount must be a positive number.' shown.
results.expected: Amount must be a positive number. shown

results.actual: if (!date) sets error 'Date is required.' Form not submitted.
results.expected: Date is required. shown

results.actual: isNaN(parseFloat('abc')) = true, error 'Amount must be a positive number.' shown.
results.expected: Amount must be a positive number. shown

results.actual: App fetches expenses on mount via fetchExpenses(). Data persisted in Supabase. Reload re-runs fetch and list repopulates.
results.expected: Expense still in list after reload

results.actual: filterCategory state drives filtered = expenses.filter(e => e.category === filterCategory). Only food expenses shown.
results.expected: Only food expenses shown when food filter selected

results.actual: filterCategory === 'all' returns full expenses array without filtering.
results.expected: All expenses restored

results.actual: filtered.length === 0 renders the empty state div with 📭 icon and message text.
results.expected: Empty state shown, not blank area

results.actual: Note span has overflow: hidden, textOverflow: ellipsis, whiteSpace: nowrap applied. Long notes truncate in row.
results.expected: Long note truncates with ellipsis, does not break row

results.actual: handleAdd prepends new expense to state array: setExpenses(prev => [created, ...prev]). Summary reads same state array, so total updates immediately on tab switch.
results.expected: New expense appears in filtered view

results.actual: total = expenses.reduce((sum, e) => sum + Number(e.amount), 0). Correctly sums all amounts.
results.expected: Total card equals sum of all expenses

results.actual: monthTotal filters e.date.startsWith(thisMonth) where thisMonth = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7).
results.expected: This Month card shows only current-month expenses

results.actual: .filter(c => c.count > 0) removes zero-count categories before rendering.
results.expected: Only categories with expenses appear

results.actual: With empty expenses array: total = 0 → $0.00. monthTotal = 0. byCategory.length = 0, section not rendered.
results.expected: $0.00 totals, no category bars

results.actual: handleAdd updates shared expenses state array. ExpenseSummary receives same state as prop. React re-renders Summary with updated total on tab switch.
results.expected: Totals update immediately after adding expense
